# Critical security practice for health checks in production environments
management.endpoint.health.show-details=never

# Secure Actuator configuration: expose ONLY essential endpoints for health monitoring

# - 'info': Provides build/application metadata (low-risk, useful for diagnostics)
# Avoids security risk of exposing all endpoints (*) while meeting monitoring requirements
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info

# Optional hardening ( uncomment if detailed health info is needed for monitoring ):
# management.endpoint.health.show-details=when_authorized
